creator: lynx.ripe@gmail.com
text:
I'm sorry, send-pr interface has 'automagically' uudecoded my text and 
prepended '\n' to it. So in order to extract files one can use the following 
command:

   tail -c +2 txt-1.txt | tar xpkzf -

I apologize for inconvenience, just wanted my PR to be self-sufficient. 
Really, 100Kb limit is too low for 2 'dmesg -v' ;(


Sincerely, Dmitry
-- 
nic-hdl: LYNX-RIPE
